overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a Harry Potter video game depicting the Gryffindor common room. The stationary camera captures students in wizard robes walking through the medieval-style room featuring a burning fireplace, red tapestries, and wooden balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with fireplace and seating areas

agents.ego_description: Stationary viewpoint watching students move through the common room

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the red sofa relaxing
student in dark robes walking across the room toward the fireplace

entered.detail: Large medieval stone fireplace with burning fire and decorative mantle
Curved red velvet sofa with students sitting and conversing
Green-shaded brass floor lamp emitting warm ambient light
Wooden balcony with railings on the upper level overlooking the room
Red wall tapestry with intricate gold designs hanging behind the fireplace
Oil painting in ornate gold frame mounted on the red wall

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in the Gryffindor common room, a cozy medieval space with a central stone fireplace, red velvet seating, and warm lamp lighting. Students in wizard robes move through the room, with some walking across the center and others relaxing on the sofa, creating a lived-in magical atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective within the Gryffindor common room, capturing the lived-in warmth of a magical student sanctuary. It begins by focusing on the cozy medieval architecture, where a central stone fireplace casts a flickering glow across red velvet seating and warm lamp lighting. As the camera lingers, the space comes alive with the movement of students in wizard robes drifting through the center of the room. The scene then settles into a rhythmic flow of activity, with some students crossing the floor while others relax on the sofas, reinforcing the atmospheric comfort of the shared living area.
